string.description: Text value used in JSX props and markdown content

number.description: Numeric value passed as JSX expression props

boolean.description: Boolean value for JSX props, true when attribute present without value

Component.description: React/JSX component that can be used inline within markdown content

MDXContent.description: The compiled MDX document as a React component

frontmatter.description: YAML metadata block at the top of the file for title, date, and custom fields
